texto: It's like there are all these languages available, especially in terms of image. Why confine yourself to only English? There's all these languages and possibilities and concepts to speak or communicate with.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Wiley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “It's like there are all these languages available, especially in terms of image. Why confine your…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, speak, yourself pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de yourself e why.
